data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for accounting invoice sync.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for accounting invoice synchronization with QuickBooks and Xero. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for accounting integration, but lacks specific evidence of successful API interactions or state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of successful integration with accounting systems (QuickBooks, Xero) for invoice synchronization.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for accounting integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that accounting systems (QuickBooks, Xero) are integrated and operational for invoice synchronization.
